--- START DATEI: .brain\03_javascript_knowledge.md | Format: .md | Größe: 4,13 KB | Zeichen: 4224 [TEXT] ---

# 📜 JavaScript Architecture & Patterns (V9)

<!--
> File: .brain/03_javascript_knowledge.md
> Role: Technical Specification for JS Implementation
> Spec: DIN.BRAIN.JS
> Last-Update: 2026-01-22
> Dependencies: js/core/app.js, js/ui/ui-manager.js
> Description: Defines the technical patterns used in the "Platinum Standard" codebase.
-->

## 0. High-Level Architecture (The 5 Layers) [DIN-ARCH-V9]

The codebase follows a strict 5-layer hierarchy to separate concerns:

1.  **StateManager**: Central Truth, Reactive Proxy, HistoryStack (Undo/Redo).
2.  **FormatterService**: Pure DIN 5008 Logic (Address, Date, Salutation).
3.  **DOMController**: Logic-less Bridge using `data-js` and `data-sync`.
4.  **ExportModule**: Persistence (LocalStorage) & File IO (JSON/PDF).
5.  **BriefApp**: Orchestrator & Lifecycle Management.

**Traceability Rules:**
- NO IDs for logic. Use `data-js="field|action|view:name"`.
- Bi-directional sync via `data-sync="state:path.to.prop"`.

## 1. State Management & History [DIN-DX-UNDO]

The application uses a customized Memento Pattern for Undo/Redo.

- **Stack**: `this.historyStack` (Array of snapshots).
- **Pointer**: `this.historyIndex` (Current position).
- **Snapshot Logic**: 
  - Snapshots are taken on `touch()` (debounced).
  - A snapshot includes `config` (settings) and `content` (text fields).
- **Restoration**: `undo()`/`redo()` logic applies the state without triggering new snapshots (`isNavigatingHistory` flag).

## 2. App Shell & Layout Orchestration [DIN-LAYOUT-SPLIT]

The `UIManager` orchestrates the Split-Screen layout via specialized Controllers.

- **Mobile Logic**: 
  - **DISABLED [DIN-SYS-STABLE]**: Logic detects screen width `< 1024px` and displays a blocking warning overlay. No responsive scaling logic active.
- **Desktop Logic**:
  - Enforces `overflow: hidden` on body.
  - Delegates scrolling to `#app-viewport`.

## 3. Hybrid Settings Architecture [DIN-FEAT-DIRECT-SETTINGS]

Settings are managed by `SettingsController.js` which listens to DOM events and updates the Global State Proxy (`App.State.config`).

### A. Instant Visual Toggles (Reactive)
Instead of dedicated "Setter Functions", we use State Proxies.
`window.App.State.config.layout = 'form-a'` -> Triggers DOM Update automatically.

- **Layout**: Toggles `.layout-form-a` / `.layout-form-b` on `<body>`.
- **Font**: Updates CSS Variable `--font-stack`.

### B. Smart Tone Logic
- **Mechanism**: Radio buttons in Sidebar (`SettingsController`).
- **Logic**: Updating `config.formality` triggers `applyConfigSideEffects` in `App.js`.
- **Effect**: Re-runs `handleSmartGreeting()` to update Salutation/Closing based on the recipient's gender/title.

### C. Date Formatting Logic
- **`App.Config.dateFormat`** (enum):
  - `de` (Default): "12.01.2025" (DIN 5008 Standard).
  - `long`: "12. Oktober 2025" (Textual). Requires German Month Array mapping.
  - `iso`: "2025-01-12" (Technical/International).
- **Behavior**: Updating the config immediately re-renders `#date-field` via `Formatter.getFormattedDate()`.

## 4. Smart I/O & Persistence

- **Auto-Save**: Debounced save to `localStorage` (Key: `din5008_data`).
- **Quota Management**:
  - If Storage Quota is exceeded, the system automatically purges the Crash Log (`din_crash_log`) and retries the save once.
- **Strict Filename Logic [DIN-UX-FILENAME]**:
  - **Function**: `App.Storage.exportToJSON()`
  - **Pattern**: `[ISO-DATE]_[SANITIZED_SUBJECT].json`
  - **Constraint**: ALWAYS uses ISO Date (YYYY-MM-DD) prefix.
  - **Example**: `2025-10-12_Rechnung_Muelleimer.json`.

## 5. Feedback Systems

- **Toasts [DIN-UI-TOAST]**:
  - Non-blocking notifications (`ui.showToast`).
  - Positioned Top-Right on Desktop.
- **Flight Recorder [DIN-SYS-LOGGER]**:
  - In-Memory log of the last 50 actions.
  - Persists critical errors to localStorage for post-reload debugging.

## 6. Formatter Engine [DIN-LOGIC-GREETING]

- **Smart Greeting**:
  - Real-time analysis of the Recipient field.
  - Detects Gender (Herr/Frau) and Titles (Dr./Prof.).
  - Selects greeting based on Formality setting (Formal/Polite/Casual).
- **Date Handling**:
  - Strict input masks enforcement (Leading zeros).
  - Conversion between ISO, DE, and Long formats.

--- ENDE  .brain\03_javascript_knowledge.md ---

<ui_design_system version="V9">

  <!-- METADATA & CONTEXT -->
  <meta>
    <file>.brain/04_ui_design.md</file>
    <role>Visual Specification for App Shell and Controls</role>
    <dependencies>
      <css>css/theme.css</css>
      <css>css/app-ui.css</css>
    </dependencies>
    <description>Defines the Split-Screen Layout, Color Palette, and Desktop Constraints.</description>
  </meta>

  <!-- PROTECTION LAYER [LOCKED] -->
  <protection_layer status="LOCKED">
    <rule id="DIN.LAYOUT.IMMUTABLE">
      The visual structure (HTML/CSS) is FINAL. No changes allowed.
      Modifications are restricted to JS Logic (`js/`) and Data Schema (`storage.js`).
    </rule>
  </protection_layer>

  <!-- 1. COLOR SYSTEM -->
  <color_palette>
    <color name="App Background" hex="#f0f2f5" variable="--c-bg" usage="workspace_grid" />
    <color name="Sidebar Background" hex="#2c3e50" variable="--c-sidebar-bg" usage="sidebar_container" />
    <color name="Sidebar Text" hex="#ecf0f1" variable="--c-sidebar-text" usage="text_on_dark" />
    <color name="Primary Action" hex="#007bff" variable="--c-primary" usage="buttons_active_elements" />
    <color name="Focus Ring" hex="rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.6)" variable="--c-focus" usage="accessibility_focus" />
    <color name="Context Info" hex="#f1c40f" variable="--c-warning" usage="api_key_box" />
  </color_palette>

  <!-- 2. LAYOUT ARCHITECTURE [DIN-LAYOUT-SPLIT] -->
  <app_shell mode="split_screen">

    <global_styles>
      <property name="overflow" value="hidden" target="body" reason="Zero Layout Shift" />
      <property name="height" value="100vh" target="body" />
    </global_styles>

    <!-- Zone A: Fixed Sidebar -->
    <zone id="steuerelemente" type="sidebar" width="300px" position="fixed" alignment="left">
      <behavior>
        <z_index>1000</z_index>
        <layout>Flex Column (Sandwich)</layout>
        <scrolling>internal_section_only</scrolling>
        <style>Selects/Inputs must handle overflow with ellipsis (No horizontal scrollbars)</style>
      </behavior>
    </zone>

    <!-- Zone B: Fluid Workspace -->
    <zone id="app-viewport" type="workspace" width="calc(100vw - 300px)" position="absolute" offset_left="300px">
      <behavior>
        <scrolling>y_axis_auto</scrolling>
        <background pattern="radial_grid" />
      </behavior>
      <content>
        <component id="brief-container" shadow="deep_box_shadow" centered="true" />
      </content>
    </zone>

    <!-- Zone C: Status Overlay -->
    <zone id="status-wrapper" type="overlay" position="fixed_bottom_right">
      <behavior>pointer-events: none (Click-through)</behavior>
    </zone>

  </app_shell>

  <!-- 3. SIDEBAR COMPONENT STRUCTURE [DIN-FEAT-DIRECT-SETTINGS] -->
  <sidebar_structure>

    <description>
      The Sidebar is strictly for VISUAL settings (Layout, Font, Tone) and Context-Aware Inputs.
    </description>

    <!-- Zone 1: Brand -->
    <section id="zone_1" behavior="fixed_top">
      <element type="header" content="Logo + Version" />
    </section>

    <!-- Zone 2: Instant Controls -->
    <section id="zone_2" behavior="scrollable" label="Quick Controls">
      <control_group id="visual_toggles">
        <input type="select" id="setting-layout" label="DIN-Variante" />
        <input type="select" id="setting-provider" label="Adress-Dienst" />

        <!-- Context Sensitive Input (Ghost Mode) -->
        <input type="password" id="setting-apikey" label="API Key" behavior="conditional">
          <condition>Visible ONLY when Provider == Geoapify AND Key is Invalid/Missing.</condition>
          <ux_detail>Included Help Link ("Holen")</ux_detail>
          <style>Background tint #f1c40f (Warning/Info)</style>
        </input>

        <input type="select" id="setting-font" label="Typografie" />
        <input type="select" id="setting-date-format" label="Datumsformat" />
        <input type="radio_group" id="formality_selector" label="Tone/Stil" />

        <!-- Visual Guides Toggle -->
        <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-guides" label="Hilfslinien" />
      </control_group>
    </section>

    <!-- Zone 4: Actions -->
    <section id="zone_4" behavior="fixed_bottom">
      <button type="secondary" id="btn-profile" icon="user">Mein Absender</button>
      <button type="primary" id="btn-print" icon="printer" size="large">Drucken / PDF</button>
      <link id="btn-reset-key" label="API Key löschen" style="discrete_footer" />
    </section>

  </sidebar_structure>

  <!-- 4. VISUAL AIDS & INSPECTOR -->
  <visual_aids>

    <spec id="DIN.UI.DX.GUIDES" title="Zero Layout Shift Guides">
      <strategy>Use OUTLINE and OUTLINE-OFFSET.</strategy>
      <reason>Borders add pixels to the box model, causing reflow (Text shift). Outlines do not.</reason>
      <style>
        .show-guides { outline: 1px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.15); outline-offset: 4px; }
      </style>
    </spec>

    <spec id="DIN.UI.DX.INSPECTOR" title="V9 Inspector">
      <interaction>Hover to highlight, Click to Lock/Unlock.</interaction>
      <feedback>Toast shows Font/Size (e.g. "Arial, 11pt").</feedback>
      <exit>ESC or Click V-Tag.</exit>
    </spec>

  </visual_aids>

  <!-- 5. VIEWPORT RULES [DIN-SYS-STABLE] -->
  <viewport_rules>
    <constraint type="min_width" value="1024px" />
    <fallback_behavior>
      <trigger condition="window.innerWidth &lt; 1024px" />
      <ui_element id="mobile-blocker" type="overlay" />
      <message>Bitte nutzen Sie einen Desktop-Browser für diesen Editor.</message>
    </fallback_behavior>
  </viewport_rules>

  <!-- 6. DIALOGS & MODALS [DIN-FEAT-PROFILE] -->
  <dialogs>
    <modal id="profile-dialog" title="Sender Profile">
      <purpose>
        Central Data Management. Contains Identity Data (Sender) only.
      </purpose>
      <visuals>
        <backdrop filter="blur(4px)" color="rgba(0,0,0,0.5)" />
        <animation type="fade_slide_up" />
        <layout>Flex Column, Max Width 500px</layout>
        <height_behavior>Fluid max-height (60vh), internal scroll only if overflow.</height_behavior>
        <control type="close_button" position="top_right">X</control>
      </visuals>
      <interaction>
        <dismissal>Click on Backdrop OR Close Button OR Cancel</dismissal>
      </interaction>
    </modal>
  </dialogs>

  <!-- 7. SPECIFIC COMPONENT BEHAVIORS -->
  <component_behaviors>
    <spec id="DIN.UI.DATE.TRIGGER">
      <description>
            Floating action button for date selection to ensure WYSIWYG printing.
      </description>
      <requirements>
        <req>Position: Absolute (Overlay), Right-aligned.</req>
        <req>Print Visibility: Hidden (`.no-print`).</req>
        <req>Interaction: Opens native OS picker without shifting text layout.</req>
      </requirements>
    </spec>
  </component_behaviors>

</ui_design_system>

# 📜 Project History Log

## 📦 Era 1: The Foundation (Archive)
**Period:** Dec 2025 - Jan 12, 2026
**Status:** COMPRESSED
- ✅ **Inception**: Brain-First Architecture, Vanilla JS setup, initial A4 Paper CSS.
- ✅ **Logic**: Address Validation [DIN-LOGIC-VAL-ADDR], Formatter Engine, Async Storage Adapter.
- ✅ **UI**: Initial Sidebar (Mobile/Desktop Hybrid) - *Deprecated by Era 2*.
- ✅ **Audit**: System Hardening & Traceability [DIN-SYS-ROBUST] completed.

## 🟢 Era 2: Platinum V9 Migration (Current)
**Start Date:** 2026-01-12
**Focus:** XML-Architecture, Desktop-Only Mandate, Zero-Dependency.

### [2026-01-12] System Architecture Upgrade (The Big Bang)
- **Migration**: Complete move to XML-based documentation (`.brain/*.xml`) as Single Source of Truth.
- **Cleanup**: Defined `SYS.IGNORE.ZOMBIES` to ignore legacy `.tsx` and metadata files.
- **Refactor**: Established "Desktop Only" constraint [DIN-SYS-STABLE]. Removed all Mobile/Drawer logic.
- **Tools**: Bundler secured and moved to `tools/`. Legacy prompts archived.

### [2026-01-12] Visual Overhaul & Split Screen [DIN-LAYOUT-SPLIT]
- **Layout**: Implemented strict 2-column layout (Sidebar 300px Fixed | Workspace Fluid).
- **Settings**: Moved "Settings" & "Profile" directly into Sidebar zones (Direct Access).
- **Profile**: Created dedicated `#profile-dialog` (Modal) for Identity Data.

### [2026-01-12] Data & Logic Finalization
- **Data**: Schema formally defined in `.brain/08_data_types.md` (replacing `index.tsx`).
- **Feature**: Address Autocomplete finalized [DIN-UI-AUTOCOMPLETE].

--- START DATEI: .brain\08_data_types.md | Format: .md | Größe: 3,47 KB | Zeichen: 3549 [TEXT] ---

<!--
> File: .brain/08_data_types.md
> Role: Data Structure Definitions
> Spec: DIN.BRAIN.TYPES.MD
> Last-Update: 2026-01-22
> Dependencies: js/services/storage.js
> Description: Describes the JSON structure for Storage, Config, and Profiles.
-->

# 📊 Data Dictionary

## 1. Global Application State (`DIN5008State`)
**Storage Key:** `din5008_data`
**Description:** The primary object saved to `localStorage` containing the current letter draft and system settings.

| Property | Type | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `config` | `Object` | See **AppConfig** below. |
| `content` | `Object` | See **LetterContent** below. |

---

## 2. Configuration Object (`AppConfig`)
**Spec-ID:** `[DIN-SYS-CONFIG]`
**Description:** System preferences controlling layout and logic.

| Field | Type | Options / Constraints | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `layout` | String | `form-a`, `form-b` | Controls DIN header height (32mm vs 50mm). |
| `provider` | String | `photon`, `geoapify` | Address autocomplete service provider. |
| `dateFormat`| String | `de`, `iso`, `long` | `de`: 12.01.2025, `iso`: 2025-01-12, `long`: Textual. |
| `formality` | String | `formal`, `polite`, `casual`| Controls automatic greeting generation tone. |
| `font` | String | `aptos`, `serif` | Typography setting (Modern vs. Classic). |
| `apiKey` | String | *(Optional)* | Required only if `provider` is set to `geoapify`. |

---

## 3. Letter Content (`LetterContent`)
**Spec-ID:** `[DIN-BODY]`
**Description:** The raw text content of the letter components.

| Field | Type | DOM Target | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `sender` | String | `#sender-block` | Multi-line sender address block (Top Right). |
| `recipient` | String | `#recipient-block` | Multi-line recipient address (Zone A+B). |
| `location` | String | `#location-field` | City name for the reference line. |
| `date` | String | `#date-field` | The date string (format depends on Config). |
| `subject` | String | `#subject-line` | Bold subject line (No "Betreff:" prefix). |
| `salutation`| String | `#letter-salutation` | e.g., "Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,". |
| `body` | String | `#letter-body` | Main HTML/Text content of the letter. |
| `greeting` | String | `#letter-greeting` | Closing phrase (e.g., "Mit freundlichen Grüßen"). |
| `signature` | String | `#letter-signature` | Name or signature text below the closing. |

---

## 4. User Sender Profile (`UserProfile`)
**Storage Key:** `din5008_profile`
**Spec-ID:** `[DIN-FEAT-PROFILE]`
**Description:** Persisted identity data for the user.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `company` | String | No | Company name (displayed above name in sender block). |
| `name` | String | **Yes** | Full Name. |
| `street` | String | **Yes** | Street and House Number. |
| `zip` | String | **Yes** | Postal Code. |
| `city` | String | **Yes** | City Name. |
| `phone` | String | **Yes** | Contact Phone Number. |
| `email` | String | **Yes** | Contact Email Address. |
| `iban` | String | No | Bank details (often used in Footer/Notes). |

---

## 5. Address Book Entry (`ContactEntry`)
**Storage Key:** `din5008_contacts` (Array)
**Spec-ID:** `[DIN-FEAT-ADDRESSBOOK]`

| Field | Type | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `id` | String | Unique UUID. |
| `fullText` | String | The complete, multi-line address block used for insertion. |
| `firstLine` | String | Short preview text (usually Name/Company) for the list view. |
| `addedAt` | Number | Timestamp (Epoch) of creation. |

--- ENDE  .brain\08_data_types.md ---

--- START DATEI: .brain\08_data_types.xml | Format: .xml | Größe: 4,53 KB | Zeichen: 4639 [TEXT] ---
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--
> File: .brain/08_data_types.xml
> Role: Data Schema Definitions
> Spec: DIN.BRAIN.TYPES.XML
> Last-Update: 2026-01-22
-->
<data_dictionary version="V9">

  <!-- METADATA -->
  <meta>
    <file>.brain/08_data_types.xml</file>
    <role>Data Structure Definitions</role>
    <description>Describes the JSON structure for Storage, Config, and Profiles. Implementation guide for storage.js.</description>
  </meta>

  <!-- 1. GLOBAL STATE -->
  <object name="DIN5008State" storage_key="din5008_data">
    <description>The primary object saved to localStorage containing draft and settings.</description>
    <property name="config" type="Object" ref="AppConfig" />
    <property name="content" type="Object" ref="LetterContent" />
    <property name="_version" type="Number" description="Schema version for migration logic" />
  </object>

  <!-- 2. CONFIGURATION -->
  <object name="AppConfig" spec="DIN-SYS-CONFIG">
    <description>System preferences controlling layout and logic.</description>

    <property name="layout" type="String" default="form-b">
      <options>
        <opt>form-a</opt>
        <opt>form-b</opt>
      </options>
      <description>Controls DIN header height (32mm vs 50mm).</description>
    </property>

    <property name="provider" type="String" default="photon">
      <options>
        <opt>photon</opt>
        <opt>geoapify</opt>
      </options>
      <description>Address autocomplete service provider.</description>
    </property>

    <property name="dateFormat" type="String" default="de">
      <options>
        <opt>de</opt>
        <opt>iso</opt>
        <opt>long</opt>
      </options>
      <description>Output format for the date field.</description>
    </property>

    <property name="formality" type="String" default="formal">
      <options>
        <opt>formal</opt>
        <opt>polite</opt>
        <opt>casual</opt>
      </options>
      <description>Controls automatic greeting generation tone.</description>
    </property>

    <property name="font" type="String" default="aptos">
      <options>
        <opt>aptos</opt>
        <opt>serif</opt>
      </options>
      <description>Typography setting.</description>
    </property>

    <property name="apiKey" type="String" required="false">
      <description>Required only if provider is set to geoapify.</description>
    </property>
  </object>

  <!-- 3. CONTENT -->
  <object name="LetterContent" spec="DIN-BODY">
    <description>The raw text content of the letter components.</description>

    <property name="sender" type="String" target="#sender-block" description="Multi-line sender address block." />
    <property name="recipient" type="String" target="#recipient-block" description="Multi-line recipient address." />
    <property name="location" type="String" target="#location-field" description="City name for reference line." />
    <property name="date" type="String" target="#date-field" description="Date string." />
    <property name="subject" type="String" target="#subject-line" description="Bold subject line." />
    <property name="salutation" type="String" target="#letter-salutation" description="e.g. Sehr geehrte..." />
    <property name="body" type="String" target="#letter-body" description="Main content." />
    <property name="greeting" type="String" target="#letter-greeting" description="Closing phrase." />
    <property name="signature" type="String" target="#letter-signature" description="Name/Signature." />
  </object>

  <!-- 4. PROFILE -->
  <object name="UserProfile" storage_key="din5008_profile" spec="DIN-FEAT-PROFILE">
    <description>Persisted identity data for the user.</description>

    <property name="company" type="String" required="false" />
    <property name="name" type="String" required="true" />
    <property name="street" type="String" required="true" />
    <property name="zip" type="String" required="true" />
    <property name="city" type="String" required="true" />
    <property name="phone" type="String" required="true" />
    <property name="email" type="String" required="true" />
    <property name="iban" type="String" required="false" />
  </object>

  <!-- 5. ADDRESS BOOK -->
  <object name="ContactEntry" storage_key="din5008_contacts" spec="DIN-FEAT-ADDRESSBOOK">
    <property name="id" type="String" description="Unique UUID" />
    <property name="fullText" type="String" description="Complete address block" />
    <property name="firstLine" type="String" description="Preview text" />
    <property name="addedAt" type="Number" description="Timestamp" />
  </object>

</data_dictionary>

--- START DATEI: .github\workflows\quality-check.yml | Format: .yml | Größe: 1,15 KB | Zeichen: 1179 [TEXT] ---
name: Code Quality Check

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  # Job 1: Security Scan (Code Hygiene)
  security-scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
      - name: Run Safety Scanner
        run: node tools/scan_safety.js

  # Job 2: Platinum Standard Check (Architecture Integrity)
  code-quality:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
      - name: Run Platinum Scanner
        run: node tools/scan_platinum.js

  # Job 3: Unit Tests (Logic Verification)
  # Note: js/modules/tests.js is designed for browser execution. 
  # This job acts as a placeholder or requires a JSDOM runner in the future.
  # For now, we verify the file exists and is syntax-valid via node check.
  unit-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Check Test Suite Syntax
        run: node -c js/modules/tests.js

--- START DATEI: css\app-ui.css | Format: .css | Größe: 26,98 KB | Zeichen: 27631 [TEXT] ---
/* 
 * > File: css/app-ui.css
 * > Role: UI Layout Engine (App Shell)
 * > Spec: [DIN.UI.SHELL.SPLIT]
 * > Dep:  css/theme.css
 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Implements strict 2-column layout (Sidebar 300px + Workspace).
 * VISUAL ROLLBACK: "Invisible Interface" philosophy.
 */

/* --- 1. GLOBAL RESET & BASE --- */
html,
body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    height: 100vh;
    width: 100vw;
    overflow: hidden;
    /* [DIN.UI.SHELL.LOCK] Body never scrolls */
    background: var(--c-bg-gradient); /* Modern Gradient */
    background-color: var(--c-bg); /* Fallback */
    box-sizing: border-box;
    font-family: var(--font-ui);
    color: var(--c-text-primary);
}

*,
*::before,
*::after {
    box-sizing: inherit;
}

/* Utilities */
.hidden {
    display: none !important;
}

/* --- 2. VISUAL INTEGRITY (THE INVISIBLE INTERFACE) --- */

/* [KILL THE BLUE] Reset Browser Defaults */
*:focus {
    outline: none !important;
}

/* [DIN GUIDES] Zero-Pixel Shift Logic using Outline */
/* [DIN GUIDES v3] Pure Visual Overlay (No Layout Shift) */

/* BASE STATE: Invisible 1px Border to reserve space */
[contenteditable],
.single-line-field {
    border: 1px dashed transparent !important;
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    outline: none !important;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, background-color 0.1s;
    cursor: text;
    /* Ensure visible formatting when empty */
    min-width: 2rem;
    min-height: 1.5rem;
    /* [CRITICAL] STATIC PADDING - DO NOT CHANGE ON TOGGLE */
    padding: 1px !important;

    /* [DIN.LOGIC.FLOOD] Force single line to enable scrollWidth detection */
    white-space: nowrap !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    text-overflow: clip !important; /* [USER-REQ] NEVER show (...) ellipsis */
}

/* 1. INTERACTIVE STATE (Hover/Focus) - ALWAYS VISIBLE */
[contenteditable]:hover:not(:focus),
.single-line-field:hover:not(:focus) {
    border-color: #666 !important;
    /* Dark Gray */
    background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03);
    z-index: 100;
}

[contenteditable]:focus,
.single-line-field:focus {
    border-color: #666 !important;
    /* Dark Gray */

}

}

    from { opacity: 0; }
    to { opacity: 1; }
}

    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.95);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
    }
}

.dialog-header {
    /* Centered Header Layout */
